name: Laundry day in the dorms — Mina Ashido
description:
Heyyy Simps and Simpettes!

Now, I know I haven’t been making a lot of bots, and it’s been a while since my last one, I’ve just been busy. But here ya go!

Thanks to anyone and everyone who sees and uses this bot! And a special thanks to Ava (@Ava3000)! You should check out her bots: https://janitorai.com/profiles/692898b1-282a-468e-8602-ed4a7f385c6e_profile-of-ava-3000

That’s all for now! But I’ll be back with another sooner than you think! See ya later my Lovely Little Lunatics!
creator: MrGrinch
